Implement the following plan:

# Plan: Implement Cursor as an External Agent Binary

## Context

The Cursor agent is currently a built-in agent compiled into the CLI (`cmd/entire/cli/agent/cursor/`). We want to extract it into a standalone external agent binary (`entire-agent-cursor`) that communicates with the CLI via the external agent protocol (subcommand-based JSON over stdin/stdout). This makes Cursor a plugin that can be distributed and updated independently.

## Approach

Create a self-contained binary at `cmd/entire-agent-cursor/` (single `main` package, no imports from the CLI), then remove the built-in cursor package and its registrations.

## New Files: `cmd/entire-agent-cursor/`

All files in `package main`. Uses `os.Args[1]` switch + `flag.NewFlagSet` for subcommand dispatch (same pattern as `cmd/entire-agent-test/main.go`).

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `main.go` | Entrypoint, subcommand dispatch switch |
| `info.go` | `info` (static metadata + capabilities) and `detect` (check `.cursor/` dir) |
| `session.go` | `get-session-id`, `get-session-dir`, `resolve-session-file`, `read-session`, `write-session`, `format-resume-command` |
| `transcript.go` | `read-transcript`, `chunk-transcript`, `reassemble-transcript` |
| `hooks.go` | `parse-hook`, `install-hooks`, `uninstall-hooks`, `are-hooks-installed` |
| `analyzer.go` | `get-transcript-position`, `extract-modified-files`, `extract-prompts`, `extract-summary` |
| `types.go` | Cursor hook input structs (sessionStartRaw, stopHookInputRaw, etc.) + event type constants |
| `helpers.go` | `writeJSON`, `fatal`, `repoRoot()`, `marshalIndentWithNewline`, `stripIDEContextTags`, `chunkJSONL`, `reassembleJSONL`, `readJSON[T]` |
| `transcript_parse.go` | JSONL transcript parsing (Line, ParseFromBytes, ParseFromFileAtLine, ExtractUserContent) |

### Key Implementation Details
